heading: Secretary of the Interior; authority to transfer lamprey control projects and act on behalf of United States Section
label: 936 Secretary of the Interior; authority to transfer lamprey control projects and act on behalf of United States Section

children.label: a
children.text: to transfer to the United States Section any lamprey control project or works under his jurisdiction now existing or now under construction; and

children.label: b
children.text: to act for or on behalf of the United States Section in the exercise of the powers granted by this chapter.
